description:
Files: runtime/src/process.rs, runtime/src/heap.rs, runtime/src/ir_runtime.rs, src/runtime.rs

Add to Process:
  mid_flight_fn_id: u32
  mid_flight_root_count: u8
  mid_flight_roots: [FzValue; 8]
  quiet_quanta: u8

Add Heap::gc_mid_flight(roots: &mut [FzValue], mailbox: &mut VecDeque<FzValue>):
  Same Cheney as gc() (no pre-pass). To-space: last_gc_live_bytes*2 or bytes_used().
  Forward each root in roots[]. Forward each heap-pointer FzValue in mailbox (iter_mut).
  BFS scan. Reclaim from-space. Reset watermark. Update last_gc_live_bytes.
  parked_cont not touched (null while mid-flight).

Add extern C helpers:
  fz_mid_flight_roots_ptr() -> u64   // &process.mid_flight_roots as u64
  fz_yield_back_edge(fn_id: u32, n: u32)  // sets mid_flight_fn_id, root_count, state=Ready, clears FZ_SHOULD_YIELD

Self-send optimisation (same commit as gc_mid_flight — mailbox root must be in place first):
  In send_via_current_runtime, self-send branch: drop deep_copy_value, push msg directly.
  Correct because gc_mid_flight now roots the mailbox.

Tests:
  gc_mid_flight forwards cons list roots correctly.
  Mailbox item with no other reference survives mid-flight GC.
  quiet_quanta increments when bytes_used() < last_gc_live_bytes/2; proactive yield after 3.
  Self-send value survives mid-flight GC cycle.
title: fz-sched.7: Process mid-flight fields, gc_mid_flight, mailbox roots, self-send opt
